sn2.19:1.1: Setting at Rājagaha. Standing to one side, the young deva Uttarā recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One: sn.i.55
sn2.19:2.1:
v.310 "Life is swept along, short is the life span;
No shelters exist for one who has reached old age.
Seeing clearly this danger in death,
One should do deeds of merit that bring happiness."
sn2.19:3.1:
v.311 "Life is swept along, short is the life span;
No shelters exist for one who has reached old age.
Seeing clearly this danger in death,
A seeker of peace should drop the world's bait."
